labelled_instruction: Use the labels to connect vocabulary with the main layers inside Earth.
base_svg: <defs><radialGradient id="ocean" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#71c7f0"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1a73a8"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="mantle" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="70%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffd45c"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e86b1e"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="core" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="70%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff4a3"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#f59e0b"/></radialGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="1100" height="720" fill="#e7f6fb"/><circle cx="410" cy="360" r="246" fill="url(#ocean)" stroke="#123a5a" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M410 114 A246 246 0 1 1 410 606 L410 114 Z" fill="#2f9f73" opacity="0.95"/><path d="M410 124 A236 236 0 1 1 410 596 L410 124 Z" fill="#f2b84b"/><path d="M410 175 A185 185 0 1 1 410 545 L410 175 Z" fill="url(#mantle)"/><path d="M410 251 A109 109 0 1 1 410 469 L410 251 Z" fill="#f97316"/><path d="M410 292 A68 68 0 1 1 410 428 L410 292 Z" fill="url(#core)"/><path d="M410 114 L410 606" stroke="#fffdf8" stroke-width="7"/><path d="M410 124 A236 236 0 0 0 410 596" fill="none" stroke="#123a5a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M410 175 A185 185 0 0 0 410 545" fill="none" stroke="#7f2d12" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M410 251 A109 109 0 0 0 410 469" fill="none" stroke="#7f2d12" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M410 292 A68 68 0 0 0 410 428" fill="none" stroke="#92400e" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="410" cy="360" r="4" fill="#7f1d1d"/><text x="88" y="102" fill="#123a5a" font-family="Arial" font-size="46" font-weight="800">Earth's Layers</text><text x="90" y="646" fill="#476173" font-family="Arial" font-size="22">Classroom model: layer thicknesses are simplified for visibility.</text>
